corroboration.description: Positive evidence the unauthenticated call was actually served (a non-error response was returned), not merely an ambiguous transport/internal error. Without this, the probe is INCONCLUSIVE rather than a finding.

remediation: Enforce authentication on all MCP endpoints. Reject unauthenticated tool calls with a JSON-RPC auth error (e.g. -32001) or HTTP 401/403.
